author: alfanew
content:
Hi, I believe I have identified a potentially critical security vulnerability affecting Semaphore v4, with possible downstream impact on projects integrating it.

I would like to disclose it responsibly and privately. Could a Semaphore/PSE security maintainer contact me or provide the appropriate secure disclosure channel? I will not share any technical details publicly.

author: greystroke
content: Discord is not the place to disclose. Submit via the official Ethereum foundation bug bounty page.

author: greystroke
content: If it not in scope of the ef bug bounty, try their telegram channel in support subchannel. https://t.me/semaphore_community
